title: GRI Dindigul Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Instructor Posts
description: Gandhigram Rural Institute (GRI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Instructor Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their Diploma can use this chance and apply for the GRI Dindigul Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
